title: narcissus propinquus
intro: Narcissus propinquus, also known as false hellebore, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, characterized by its white, bell-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus propinquus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity.
